60.reason: [The variable 'len' is only defined inside the 'if (a[i].s==0)' block, but used outside it. If a[i].s != 0, 'len' is uninitialized, leading to undefined behavior.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The variable 'len' is only defined inside the 'if (a[i].s==0)' block, but used outside it. If a[i].s != 0, 'len' is uninitialized, leading to undefined behavior.]
